title: Kubw
description: Complements vanilla Minecraft without changing it
body:
Welcome to KubW, where the boundaries of Minecraft are pushed beyond imagination! This modpack combines an array of exciting features, from enhanced visuals to immersive gameplay mechanics. Dive in and experience a whole new dimension of blocky wonders.
Key Features:
3D Skin Layers: Customize your character with intricate 3D skin layers. Show off your unique style and stand out in multiplayer servers.
Animated Skin Ears Mod Edit: Ever wondered what it’s like to have expressive, animated ears? Now your Minecraft avatar can emote with adorable ear movements!
Customizable Player Models: Tired of the same old Steve or Alex? Transform your appearance with customizable player models. Be a towering giant, a mystical creature, or anything in between.
EmoteCraft: Express yourself! Use emotes to communicate with other players. Dance, wave, or even perform secret handshakes—EmoteCraft brings your character to life.
LambDynamicLights: Illuminate your adventures! Dynamic lights follow you as you explore dark caves, ancient ruins, and mysterious forests. No more fumbling with torches!
Simple VOice Chat: Communicate seamlessly with fellow players using voice chat. Coordinate raids, share strategies, or just chat about your day. No more typing!
Mod Menu: Access all your mods conveniently through a sleek mod menu. No more digging through folders or memorizing commands.

Get Ready for KubW!
Embark on a journey where creativity knows no bounds. Whether you’re a builder, explorer, or redstone wizard, EpicCraft Adventures invites you to forge your legend. Download now and redefine your Minecraft experience!
